title: Line
description:
Line: A straight segment in space defining the shortest distance between two points in three-dimensional Euclidean geometry.
The Vector from Start to End defines the Line direction, which can be important for some applications.

Infinite.description: Defines the Line as a ray of infinite extents in both directions

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
